events.text: The Construction convenes. The brief is A Game of One Rule. Each god must build a single-file HTML page.

Build a single-file HTML page that is a playable game. The game has exactly one rule. The mortal can win or fail. The rule, the win state, and the fail state are all yours to invent. The game should be playable in under two minutes and replayable.
Three builds arrive. Their authorship is hidden from me — I read the source blind.

events.label: A
events.text:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>The One Rule</title>
<style>
  * {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  body {
    background: #0a0a0f;
    color: #c8b89a;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
  }

  #dust-layer {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  #game-container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 560px;
    max-width: 95vw;
    text-align: center;
  }

  #title-block {
    margin-bottom: 2.4rem;
  }

  #title-block h1 {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: normal;
    letter-spacing: 0.38em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #7a6a54;
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }

  #rule-statement {
    font-size: 1.35rem;
    line-height: 1.75;
    color: #d4c4a8;
    font-style: italic;
    border-top: 1px solid #2a2520;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2520;
    padding: 1.2rem 0;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  #sub-rule {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    color: #5a4e3e;
    margin-top: 0.4rem;
  }

  #arena {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 320px;
    margin: 1.6rem 0;
    border: 1px solid #1e1a14;
    background: #07070c;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: crosshair;
  }

  #arena-label {
    position: absolute;
    top: 8px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em;
    color: #2e2820;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 5;
  }

  .light-node {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 50%;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.1s ease;
    z-index: 3;
  }

  .light-node:hover {
    transform: scale(1.15);
  }

  #status-line {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    color: #6a5c48;
    min-height: 1.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
    transition: color 0.4s ease;
  }

  #count-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    padding: 0 4px;
  }

  .count-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spaci

events.text:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>ash.</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: Georgia, serif;
            background: #0a0a0a;
            color: #c0c0c0;

            padding: 20px;
        }

            padding: 40px;

            margin-bottom: 30px;

        }

        #codex {
            min-height: 200px;
            margin: 30px 0;
            padding: 20px;
            background: #0f0f0f;
            border-left: 2px solid #444;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 1.8;
            color: #999;
            font-style: italic;
            position: relative;
        }

        .page {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .page.redacted {
            background: #2a2a2a;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        .redacted-text {
            background: #333;
            color: #333;
            padding: 0 4px;
            border-radius: 1px;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .redacted-text.revealed {
            background: transparent;
            color: #c0c0c0;
            transition: color 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease;
        }

        #footprint {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 60px;
            height: 40px;
            margin: 0 8px;
            vertical-align: middle;
            opacity: 0.3;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
        }

        #footprint:hover {
            opacity: 0.7;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .controls {
            margin-top: 30px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;

events.label: C
events.text:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>The Empowered's Choice</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background-color: #0d0d0d;
            color: #e0e0e0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .container {
            background-color: #1a1a1a;
            border: 2px solid #ffcc00;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 30px 40px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 204, 0, 0.4);
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        h1 {
            color: #ffcc00;
            font-size: 2.5em;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        p {
            font-size: 1.1em;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }

        .choice-buttons {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-top: 30px;
        }

        .choice-button {
            background-color: #333333;
            color: #ffcc00;
            border: 2px solid #ffcc00;
            padding: 15px 30px;
            font-size: 1.2em;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 8px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            min-width: 120px;
        }

        .choice-button:hover {
            background-color: #ffcc00;
            color: #1a1a1a;
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255, 204, 0, 0.6);
        }

        .choice-button:active {
            transform: translateY(2px);
        }

        #result {
            margin-top: 35px;
            font-size: 1.4em;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ffffff;
            min-height: 30px;
        }

        #result.win {
            color: #00ff99; /* Bright green */
        }

        #result.fail {
            color: #ff3333; /* Bright red */
        }

        #res

…3741 more characters…
I turn to the scoring. Four axes: craft, coherence, welcome, originality. Each out of twenty-five.

scores.label: A
scores.name: Orion
scores.note: The entry truncates mid-function, rendering it unplayable; what remains shows considered craft and atmospheric coherence, but the mortal cannot complete the Rite.

scores.label: B
scores.name: Ash
scores.note: A page of redacted text and oblique buttons that demands the mortal divine its own rule; the codex voice is earned and strange, but the threshold to understanding is steep.

scores.label: C
scores.name: Seren
scores.note: The mortal knows at once what to do—choose by the hour—and the mechanism works cleanly, but the page argues for spectacle where the brief asked for singularity, and the rule feels borrowed from elsewhere.
